diary_entries.entry: Population: 31. Hydroponic crops show signs of blight. I spent the year on mediation. Closest to Selene.
Population: 31. Hydroponic crops show signs of blight. I spent the year on coding. Closest to Phobos.
The crop_blight changed everything. I feel worried about our future here.

meta_awareness: Phobos (year 88): 'If I can spawn a sub-simulation to test governance, who spawned the simulation I live in to test THEIR governance?'
